channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: microsoft /typescript-go | Go | N/A
item.description: Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript

item.title: deepseek-ai /DeepEP | Cuda | N/A
item.description: DeepEP: an efficient expert-parallel communication library

item.title: codecrafters-io /build-your-own-x | Markdown | N/A
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: Anil-matcha /Open-Generative-AI | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

item.title: dani-garcia /vaultwarden | Rust | N/A
item.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

item.title: PostHog /posthog | Python | N/A
item.description: 🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.

item.title: open-metadata /OpenMetadata | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.

item.title: zilliztech /claude-context | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.

item.title: Z4nzu /hackingtool | Python | N/A
item.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers

item.title: google /osv-scanner | Go | N/A
item.description: Vulnerability scanner written in Go which uses the data provided byhttps://osv.dev

item.title: huggingface /ml-intern | Python | N/A
item.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models

item.title: Alishahryar1 /free-claude-code | Python | N/A
item.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
